description:
## Problem
All tool definitions in `src/tools/tokens.ts` and `src/tools/typescript.ts` define `inputSchema` without `additionalProperties: false`. Per JSON Schema spec, schemas without this flag silently accept and ignore extra properties. An AI agent can pass garbage extra fields to any tool with no validation error.

MCP best practice recommends strict schema validation.

## Fix
Add `additionalProperties: false` to every `inputSchema` object in all tool definition files:

```
inputSchema: {
  type: 'object',
  properties: { ... },
  required: [...],
  additionalProperties: false,
},
```

Apply to:
- `src/tools/tokens.ts` — `get_design_tokens`, `find_token`
- `src/tools/typescript.ts` — `get_file_diagnostics`, `get_project_diagnostics`
- Any new tool files created during Product Implementation (discovery, cem, health, safety tools)

## Acceptance Criteria
- All tool `inputSchema` objects include `additionalProperties: false`
- Zod schemas already handle actual runtime validation so no behavior changes
- Consistent with MCP SDK recommendations for tool schemas
title: Add additionalProperties: false to all MCP tool input schemas
